title: Bromum
body:
![bromum no bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6ac58db9b4905c4217c70fdb1a6f41b0eb0d4c.png)
# Introduce
Hello! Bromum modpack will allow you to play Minecraft with high frame rate without loss of quality and providing system and game performance. 
# Why Bromum?
Our modpack is created specifically for comfortable play with high FPS, using the render engine from the Vulkan mod. Thanks to this modpack, you can truly feel the smoothness of the game without unnecessary functions that will only interfere with your comfortable play.
> Special thanks to **Vulkan Optimized** for some of their configs.

### List of mods:
<details>
<summary>Expand</summary>

* Alternate Current
* BadOptimizations
* ClientSort
* Cloth Config v17
* Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
* Dark Loading Screen
* Debugify
* EntityCulling
* FPS Reducer
* Fabric API
* Fabric Language Kotlin
* Fast IP Ping
* FerriteCore
* Ksyxis
* Language Reload
* Lithium
* Mod Menu
* More Culling
* Mouse Tweaks
* No Chat Reports
* Noisium
* Noxesium
* Packet Fixer
* Placeholder API
* Reconnect Mod: Reloaded
* Very Many Players
* VulkanMod
* YetAnotherConfigLib
* Zoomify
* shut up realms

</details>

# Works everywhere
Bromum does not add any new content to the game at all, allowing you to access any possible server with the selected version of the game.
# Support and Issues
If you have an error or just need help, contact my [discord server](https://discord.gg/2TRCbjzdmh). There I will help you and tell you how to fix various problems

**It is recommended to play with a licensed copy of the Minecraft Java game!**

![32x32](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/578569ef564dc8e6022d6bf85a8030f3f7623bd2.png) Thank you for choosing Bromum!
